'''Massif''' was a prisoner within the [[Cog Hive Seven]] facility by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Massif was a member of the [[Bone Kings]] gang and a lieutenant to the gang's leader, [[Vasco Nailhead]]. Security guard [[Augustine Smight]] considered Massif an "animal."

{{Char-stub}}
